changes.summary: Replaced inline createdAt/updatedAt on InvestmentSchema, CommunityWalletSchema, and VoteSchema with TimestampsSchema.merge. VoteSchema keeps optional updatedAt via .extend override after merge.

notes: base-schemas.ts unchanged; TimestampsSchema already provides createdAt/updatedAt. VoteSchema merges TimestampsSchema for createdAt (required datetime) and overrides updatedAt to optional to preserve prior behavior.
